text.title: Prompt Patterns for Common Dev Tasks Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the rubric artefact this methodology produces. Validator in scripts/validate-prompt-patterns-for-common-dev-tasks.py enforces required keys, enum bounds, and pattern constraints.

section.title: Schema

example.code: { "prompt_id": "2026-05-23-001", "pattern": "Bug-Repro", "intent": "Reproduce the 500 on POST /refund when amount=0.", "inputs": [ "apps/payments/views.py", "tests/payments/test_refund.py" ], "format": "pytest test that fails on main and passes after your fix", "success_criterion": "pytest tests/payments/test_refund.py::test_zero_amount_refund exits 0", "score": 3 }
example.note: All required keys present; enums and patterns satisfied.
Forbidden traits: score<2; missing intent/inputs/format/success_criterion; pattern not in enum.
